site.title: Frequently Asked Questions | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Find answers to common questions about our printing, promotional products, and graphic design services. Get help with orders, shipping, turnaround times, and more.

hero.title: FAQs
hero.imageAlt: ION Print & Promo customer service and support

centreText.title: We're here to help!
centreText.description: Have questions about our services, ordering process, or turnaround times? Browse our most frequently asked questions below, or reach out to our team directly—we're always happy to help!

accordions.title: What print and graphic design services do you offer?
accordions.content: We create high-quality print and design materials including logos, business cards, brochures, flyers, postcards, presentation folders, signage, banners, posters, labels, packaging, calendars, and promotional products. Everything is built to align with your brand and ready for professional production.

accordions.title: Do you handle both design and printing?
accordions.content: Yes. We manage the entire process — from concept and design to final printing and delivery. You get a seamless experience without needing multiple vendors or third-party printers.

accordions.title: What areas do you service?
accordions.content: We proudly serve Simcoe County, Barrie, Midland, Orillia, Collingwood, Innisfil, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). Delivery or pickup options are available depending on the project.

accordions.title: How long do print projects take?
accordions.content: Turnaround times depend on the project. Many standard print jobs can be completed within a few business days, while larger or specialty items may take 1–2 weeks. Rush options are available when timelines are tight.

accordions.title: Can you match my existing brand or print materials?
accordions.content: Absolutely. We can match your colours, fonts, and style to ensure every piece stays consistent with your brand — whether we're updating an existing design or creating something new.

accordions.title: What if I don't have a logo or branding yet?
accordions.content: We can help build your brand from the ground up. This includes logo design, colour palettes, typography, and brand guidelines so all future print materials stay cohesive and professional.

accordions.title: What print finishes and materials do you offer?
accordions.content: We offer a wide range of premium options: matte and gloss laminations, soft-touch, spot UV, raised UV, foil, embossing, specialty papers, durable outdoor signage materials, and more. We'll guide you to the best choice for your project and budget.

accordions.title: Do you provide proofs before printing?
accordions.content: Yes — you'll always receive a digital proof or print sample (where applicable) to confirm layout, colours, and content before anything goes to production.

accordions.title: Can I reorder previous print jobs?
accordions.content: Definitely. We keep your artwork and print specifications on file, making reorders quick, accurate, and consistent every time.

accordions.title: Do you offer delivery?
accordions.content: Yes. We offer local delivery throughout Simcoe County and ship throughout the GTA. Larger items like signage can be arranged for pickup or direct delivery to your business.

cta.heading: Still have questions? Visit us at 178 Tiffin Street, Barrie or call us at 705-739-1969!
cta.imageAlt: ION Print & Promo customer service team ready to help
